Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers

package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
Provides UI helper utilities and support classes.

Helper components centralize cross-cutting interface concerns such as formatting, adapter logic, and reusable utility behavior.

Responsibilities:

  • Offer reusable UI support methods.
  • Reduce duplication across interface components.
  • Encapsulate common view-layer utility patterns.
Since:
1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
    Defines top-level user interface composition and wiring.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions
    Contains reusable UI action handlers.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.help
    Contains help and guidance UI components.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
    Contains UI panel implementations for major screens.
  • Class
    Description
    AlertBox
    Utility class providing static methods to display common JavaFX Alert dialogs.
    DateRangePickerDialog
    Simple helper to prompt the user for a start and end date using two DatePicker controls inside a Dialog.
    DateSelectionMode
    Defines different modes for selecting dates or date ranges, typically used in report criteria dialogs.
    FocusCommitTextFieldTableCell<S,T>
    A custom TextFieldTableCell that commits the edit when the TextField loses focus.
    NpbkFileChooserFX
    Unified Java FX file-chooser helper.
    ReportCriteriaDialog
    Utility class for displaying a JavaFX dialog to gather criteria for generating reports.
    TableExportUtils
    Utility methods to print and export JavaFX TableView data.
